name: Diabetic Ham and Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 20 oz. can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Make white sauce: Melt margarine in a saucepan. Gradually blend in flour. Remove from heat and gradually add milk, stirring constantly. Return to low heat and stir slowly until the sauce boils. Add salt.
2. Stir in mustard, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce into the white sauce.
3. Add corn, onion, green pepper, and ham to the white sauce mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into a nonstick casserole dish.
5. Top with breadcrumbs and cheese.
6. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes or until bubbly.
